description: Style NoteA perfect addition to your ethnic wardrobe, these flat sandals from catwalk are crafted from durable material in fashionable cuts to offer exemplary comfort without compromising on style.Product DetailsGrey flats with black heavily embellished thong style strap and a toe separatorSmooth footbed with stitched detailing on the periphery of the footbedSmooth footbed with an upraised heelMaterial and Care  SyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
